description: Published trust posture configuration surface. Trust posture is an operator-owned decision; dangerous or authority-expanding choices require explicit opt-ins and never become hidden authority.

additiveChanges: Adding new optional fields or new enum values is additive and backward-compatible.
breakingChanges: Removing or renaming a field, or changing required semantics, is a breaking change.
compatibilityPolicy.stabilityLimit: This contract does not claim runtime enforcement beyond the existing setup-readiness and config-loader runtime.
